summary: Iteration 12: Analytics and Digest features - Backend 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all 6 tabs working). New features: Analytics tab shows engagement metrics (login activity, message activity, attendance rate, assignment completion, meetings), Digest tab allows configuring weekly email digest with enable/disable, day/hour/audience settings and manual Send Now.
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoint returns comprehensive engagement data: login_activity, message_activity, attendance_rate, assignment_completion_rate, meetings metrics
Digest settings properly persist to MongoDB digest_settings collection
Digest scheduler runs as asyncio background task checking hourly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
SchoolAdminReporting.jsx now has 6 tabs (up from 4 in iteration 11)

frontend_analytics_tab.stat_cards: Attendance Rate, Assignment Rate, Messages (Week), New Users (Week), Meetings (Week), Announcements (Week), Conversations, Discipline (Month) ✓
frontend_analytics_tab.attendance_snapshot: Shows records, present count, progress bar ✓

frontend_digest_tab.result_message: ✓ data-testid='digest-send-result' shows 'Digest sent to X recipient(s)'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12: Added Analytics and Digest tabs to SchoolAdminReporting. Backend has /api/admin/analytics (engagement metrics), /api/admin/digest/settings (GET/PATCH), /api/admin/digest/send (POST). Frontend SchoolAdminReporting.jsx now has 6 tabs. Digest scheduler runs as asyncio background task. All 16 backend tests passed, all frontend tabs verified working. Previous iteration 11 tested announcements, calendar, documents, stats - all still working.
